summary: Plan-only review of five unrelated open PRs. No PR has enough complete merge preflight for a merge recommendation; several have explicit waiting-on-author labels, failing proof/checks, broad scope, or missing Codex /review proof. No GitHub mutation is planned.

actions.reason: Potentially useful contributor PR, but plan mode cannot recommend merge without a complete merge preflight or resolve the waiting-on-author state from the artifact.
Broad UI feature PR with failing proof, non-main base, and incomplete PR description needs maintainer/product judgment rather than merge or automated repair.
Risky infra/session-state janitor PR has a failing build-artifacts check and unresolved waiting-on-author/review state; it is not safe to merge or auto-repair from this shard.
This looks like a strong candidate for maintainer review, but merge requires current mergeability plus clean Codex /review and resolved bot-comment evidence that the artifact does not contain.
Useful but cross-surface auth-provider/config change with waiting-on-author label and missing merge preflight; maintainer judgment is required before merge or repair planning.

needs_human: #87255: decide whether to refresh/repair the contributor branch after resolving waiting-on-author and Codex review state.
#87300: decide product intent for broad Control UI feature PR with failing proof and develop base.
#87373: decide whether the risky infra janitor script belongs in-tree after build-artifacts failure is understood.
#87393: likely maintainer-review candidate, but requires current mergeability and clean Codex /review before merge.
#87478: decide whether broad MCP OAuth config/schema/docs change is desired and ready for repair/merge after current review.
